description.p: Write markdown, upload documents, and Lattice weaves everything into a queryable knowledge graph an AI assistant answers from - with citations back to your own notes.

Notes live in a single database or as plain markdown files on disk that you can edit with any tool, sync, and version - Lattice picks up external edits on launch. Wikilinks and tags build a deterministic graph as you type; an LLM pass extracts entities and relationships on top of it.

Bring your own models: OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel AI Gateway, or any OpenAI-compatible local endpoint such as Ollama or LM Studio - for chat and embeddings independently. Everything stays on your machine except the AI API calls you configure.

screenshot.caption: The editor: markdown with live preview, wikilinks, and tags
The knowledge graph your notes build
The assistant answers from your graph and cites its sources
